scope: Compact index of MoonCatRescue architecture decision records evidenced by approved local references or registered high-confidence source locations. It records decision intent and explicit consequences; it is not implementation, deployment, or live-state evidence.

coverage.inventoryMethod: Searched checked-in references/research notes and registered high-confidence source locations without network access.
limitations: Only ADR 0017 has a registered, reviewed ADR source location in the current checkout.
No local ADR corpus or directory listing is checked in, so this is not a claim that ADR 0017 is the only MoonCatRescue ADR.
Missing ADR numbers, dates, authors, supersession links, and implementation completion are not inferred from numbering or source order.

decisions.title: MoonCat Color Math
decisions.decisionSummary: Treat the original JavaScript mooncatparser color behavior as the color reference; apply integer hue handling and human-friendly hue labels, while preserving the documented color-matching and Solidity edge-case boundaries.
implementationConsequences: Use the ADR as intent evidence when reviewing color behavior, then cross-check parser or contract surfaces before making canonical implementation claims.
Keep truncated integer hue handling and the twelve-label presentation model distinct from exact palette, RGB, hex, or rendered-output claims.
For pure-coated visual matching, do not treat the coat-pattern color as visually used solely because it is represented in source traits.
Treat MoonCatColors mapColors as documented edge-case context, not proof that a particular current Solidity or JavaScript output is deployed.
limitations: The checked-in index does not copy the ADR body or establish a complete ADR corpus.
The registered source notes status Accepted and an update date, but do not provide a decision date in reviewed evidence for this index.
Decision intent does not prove current deployed behavior, live chain state, or downstream implementation completion.
